---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with the evolve-loop pipeline
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Phase

Which phase did the issue occur in?

- [ ] Phase 2: DISCOVER (Scout)
- [ ] Phase 3: BUILD (Builder)
- [ ] Phase 4: AUDIT (Auditor)
- [ ] Phase 5: SHIP (Orchestrator)
- [ ] Phase 6: LEARN (Operator + instincts)

## Agent

Which agent was involved?

- [ ] evolve-scout
- [ ] evolve-builder
- [ ] evolve-auditor
- [ ] evolve-operator
- [ ] Orchestrator (inline)

## Command Used

```
/evolve-loop <arguments>
```

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include error messages or unexpected output.

## Workspace Files

Attach or paste relevant workspace files (e.g., `scout-report.md`, `build-report.md`, `audit-report.md`).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15]
- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.x.x]
- Evolve Loop version: [e.g., 6.1.0]
- Project language/framework: [e.g., TypeScript/Next.js]
